feature_descriptions.price_to_user_mean: Current price divided by the user's historical average price.
feature_descriptions.is_view: Current event is a product view.
feature_descriptions.is_cart: Current event is an add-to-cart action.
feature_descriptions.session_event_index: Position of the event within the current session.
feature_descriptions.session_click_count: Clicks observed in the current session up to this event.
feature_descriptions.session_cart_count: Cart additions observed in the current session up to this event.
feature_descriptions.user_total_clicks: Historical clicks for the user before the current session.
feature_descriptions.user_total_carts: Historical cart additions for the user before the current session.
feature_descriptions.user_total_purchases: Historical completed purchases for the user.
